title: api2skill: OpenAPI/Swagger → Claude Skill generator (MVP)
description: MVP: .NET console app converts an OpenAPI/Swagger spec into a self-contained Claude Skill (SKILL.md + .cs/.fsx/.csx dispatcher + reference/ + secrets template). Spec: specs/001-openapi-to-skill/spec.md (decisions D1-D7). Full lane. Session: _code_agent/20260710-openapi-to-skill.

comments.author: andrii
comments.text: Phases 1-4 complete (full lane, session 20260710-openapi-to-skill). Intake + edge-cases + REQ-0001 written; requirements gate PASS. Canonical spec: specs/001-openapi-to-skill/spec.md (D1-D7). STOPPED before Phase 5 (design/ADR) per human instruction.

comments.author: andrii
comments.text: Phase 5 (Design) complete. Spec Kit: plan.md + research.md + data-model.md + contracts/{cli,skill-output}.md + quickstart.md. Pipeline: SDD-0001, TDD-0001, ADR-0001/0002/0003. Design gate PASS. Stack: .NET 10, Microsoft.OpenApi 3.8, System.CommandLine 2.0; plain HttpClient in generated code. Next: /speckit-tasks (Phase 6).

comments.author: andrii
comments.text: Phase 6 (Planning) complete. tasks.md = 44 tasks across Setup/Foundational/US1-US5/Polish; 8 story issues (.1-.8) created. IMPLEMENTATION-PLAN-0001 with dep graph. Tasks gate PASS. MVP = US1+US2 (authenticated skill from a file). Next: Phase 7 implementation (/speckit-implement or per-task dev).

title: WI-SETUP: project + fixtures (T001-004)
acceptance_criteria: Solution builds; test project runs; fixtures (petstore.json, multi-auth.yaml) present.
close_reason: WI-SETUP complete: solution scaffolded, deps pinned (Microsoft.OpenApi 3.8.0, System.CommandLine 2.0.9), SDK pinned to 10.0.102 GA via global.json, fixtures created. Build: 0 warn/0 err.

title: WI-FOUND: parse→model→write core (T005-011)
acceptance_criteria: parse->model->write skeleton runs on petstore; SkillModelBuilder mapping unit test passes.
close_reason: WI-FOUND complete: CLI skeleton, SkillModel + SkillModelBuilder, OpenApiLoader (incl. YAML reader registration), IScriptEmitter seam, SkillWriter base. Smoke-verified end-to-end against both fixtures (JSON+YAML), all 4 auth schemes, filters, and exit codes 0/1/3/4. Build clean, test gate PASS.

title: WI-US1: file → .cs skill (MVP) (T012-018)
acceptance_criteria: AC-1 loadable skill dir from petstore; AC-3 SKILL.md index-only with per-tag reference; golden test passes.
close_reason: WI-US1 complete: SkillMdWriter, ReferenceWriter, CsFileEmitter wired end-to-end. 13 tests (golden + unit, both JSON and YAML fixtures). Verified against a real local HTTP server: path substitution, method routing, auth warnings all correct for both input formats. Two real generator bugs (top-level-statement field decl, semicolon vs comma in collection init) caught only by running the generated output, not by the generator's own build.

title: WI-US2: auth + secrets (T019-026)
acceptance_criteria: AC-2 authenticated call per scheme vs stub; AC-5 --force preserves secrets.json, no secret in generated files.

title: WI-US3: url/stdin + insecure (T027-030)
acceptance_criteria: AC-6/EC-8 self-signed URL fails without --insecure and succeeds with it; stdin parses.

title: WI-US4: fsx/csx emitters (T031-035)
acceptance_criteria: AC-4/SC-004 .cs/.fsx/.csx each run with their documented runner.

title: WI-US5: filters + error contract (T036-040)
acceptance_criteria: AC-7 invalid spec exit 1 no partial output; AC-8 existing dir exit 3; empty spec minimal+exit 0.
